properties.displayName: KLZ — Cognitive Services accounts must have public network access disabled
properties.description: Audits or denies any Cognitive Services / AI Foundry account whose publicNetworkAccess is not 'Disabled'. Enforce private endpoint-only data plane after Phase A.5 private endpoints are in place. Default mode is Audit; promote to Deny per ring after Audit shows a clean baseline.

metadata.description: Audit to flag, Deny to block.
